---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature or improvement you would like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? Which problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe your idea as clearly as possible. Feel free to sketch pseudocode or
reference related papers / implementations.

## Alternatives considered

Are there any simpler alternatives that could achieve the same goal?

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or links.
